column1:
It wasn't cold, so we didn't light a fire. 

If it_________________cold, we'd have lit a fire.

John didn't come, so we didn't do any painting. 

If John__________________, we'd have done some painting.

Claire didn't buy any clothes because she didn't see anything she liked. 

Claire_____________some clothes if she'd seen something she liked.

The audience laughed because the joke was very funny. 

If the joke_____________very funny, the audience wouldn't have laughed.

We decided to leave it was really noisy. 

We______________to leave if it hadn't been really noisy.
